moments.title: Wimbledon 2026 Kicks Off
moments.blurb: The world's most prestigious tennis tournament, Wimbledon, is set to begin at the All England Club early next week, bringing two weeks of grass-court action.

angles.name: Anticipation
angles.copy: Centre Court is calling! Wimbledon 2026 is almost here, get ready for two weeks of unmissable tennis. Who's your pick for the trophy this year?

angles.name: British Hopes
angles.copy: Strawberries and cream at the ready! The iconic Wimbledon championships are just days away. Can a Brit go all the way?

moments.title: Tour de France Begins
moments.blurb: The world's biggest cycling race, the Tour de France, commences its gruelling three-week journey across France and beyond this weekend.

angles.name: Grand Départ
angles.copy: And they're off! The Tour de France 2026 begins this weekend. Get ready for epic climbs, daring descents, and pure athletic endurance.

angles.name: Yellow Jersey Chase
angles.copy: Who will wear yellow? The Tour de France kicks off, promising three weeks of incredible sporting drama. Will you be following the peloton?

moments.title: Glastonbury Festival Wraps Up
moments.blurb: The legendary Glastonbury Festival concludes its 2026 edition this weekend, with headline performances and memorable moments from Worthy Farm.

angles.name: Festival Finale
angles.copy: That's a wrap for Glastonbury 2026! What was your highlight from the fields of Worthy Farm this year? So many amazing sets!

angles.name: Post-Glasto Blues
angles.copy: The tents are coming down, the mud is (maybe) drying... who's already got the post-Glastonbury blues? What a weekend!

moments.title: Love Supreme Jazz Festival
moments.blurb: Europe's largest outdoor summer jazz festival, Love Supreme, takes place from July 3-5 at Glynde Place, East Sussex, featuring a stellar lineup of jazz, funk, and soul artists.

angles.name: Jazz Weekend
angles.copy: The Love Supreme Jazz Festival is just around the corner! Get ready for a soulful weekend of incredible music in the beautiful East Sussex countryside. Who are you excited to see?

angles.name: Festival Vibes
angles.copy: Sun, soul, and sensational sounds! Love Supreme Jazz Festival brings the best in jazz, funk, and R&B to Glynde Place next weekend. Don't miss out!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Nicole Scherzinger
moments.blurb: Singer, dancer, and TV personality Nicole Scherzinger, known for The Pussycat Dolls and her solo career, turns 48 on June 29, 2026.

angles.name: Pussycat Doll Power
angles.copy: Wishing a very happy 48th birthday to the incredible Nicole Scherzinger! From Pussycat Dolls hits to solo anthems, she always brings the fire. 🔥

angles.name: Pop Diva
angles.copy: Happy Birthday to pop superstar Nicole Scherzinger! We're celebrating her 48th today with some of her biggest tracks. What's your favourite?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Debbie Harry
moments.blurb: The iconic lead singer of Blondie, Debbie Harry, celebrates her 81st birthday on July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Punk Icon
angles.copy: Happy 81st Birthday to the one and only Debbie Harry! The legendary Blondie frontwoman still rocks. What's your favourite Blondie track?

angles.name: Timeless Style
angles.copy: Celebrating the incomparable Debbie Harry's 81st birthday today! An absolute icon of music and style. ✨

moments.title: Happy Birthday Missy Elliott
moments.blurb: Five-time Grammy Award-winning rapper, singer, and producer Missy Elliott turns 55 on July 1, 2026.

angles.name: Queen of Hip-Hop
angles.copy: Get Ur Freak On! It's Missy Elliott's 55th birthday on July 1st! Celebrating a true innovator and legend in hip-hop. What's your favourite Missy video?

angles.name: Birthday Beats
angles.copy: Happy 55th Birthday to the one and only Missy Elliott! Still influencing generations with her iconic sound and style. Drop your favourite track!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Lindsay Lohan
moments.blurb: Actress and singer Lindsay Lohan, known for 'Mean Girls' and her pop music, celebrates her 40th birthday on July 2, 2026.

angles.name: Millennium Icon
angles.copy: It's Lindsay Lohan's 40th birthday on July 2nd! From teen queen movies to pop hits, she defined an era. What's your favourite Lindsay Lohan moment?

angles.name: Pop Throwback
angles.copy: Happy 40th to Lindsay Lohan! We're throwing it back to her 'Speak' and 'A Little More Personal (Raw)' days. What a pop journey!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Vince Clarke
moments.blurb: Synth-pop pioneer Vince Clarke, co-founder of Depeche Mode, Yazoo, and Erasure, turns 66 on July 3, 2026.

angles.name: Synth Legend
angles.copy: Happy 66th Birthday to the synth-pop wizard Vince Clarke! From Depeche Mode to Yazoo to Erasure, his influence is undeniable. What's your favourite track he's touched?

angles.name: Electronic Genius
angles.copy: Celebrating Vince Clarke's 66th today! The man behind so many iconic 80s hits. What's your go-to Erasure or Yazoo song?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Shane Lynch
moments.blurb: Boyzone member Shane Lynch, known for his pop hits and TV appearances, celebrates his 50th birthday on July 3, 2026.

angles.name: Boyzone at 50
angles.copy: Can you believe Shane Lynch is turning 50 on July 3rd?! Happy Birthday to the Boyzone star! What's your favourite Boyzone memory?

angles.name: Pop Star Milestone
angles.copy: Happy 50th Birthday to Shane Lynch! Celebrating the Boyzone legend today. Let's hear your favourite hit from the Irish lads!

moments.title: Happy Birthday Post Malone
moments.blurb: Grammy-nominated artist Post Malone, known for his genre-bending hits, celebrates his 31st birthday on July 4, 2026.

angles.name: Pop-Rock Star
angles.copy: Happy 31st Birthday to the one and only Post Malone on July 4th! Dropping some of his biggest tracks to celebrate. What's your favourite?

angles.name: Birthday Banger
angles.copy: Celebrating Post Malone's 31st today! The artist who consistently blurs genre lines. What track are you playing to mark the occasion?

moments.title: Happy Birthday RZA
moments.blurb: Wu-Tang Clan leader, rapper, and producer RZA, a highly influential figure in hip-hop, celebrates his 57th birthday on July 5, 2026.

angles.name: Hip-Hop Architect
angles.copy: Happy 57th Birthday to the legendary RZA from Wu-Tang Clan on July 5th! His beats changed the game. What's your favourite Wu-Tang track?

angles.name: Wu-Tang Forever
angles.copy: Celebrating the genius that is RZA on his 57th birthday! An absolute titan of hip-hop production and artistry.

moments.title: Happy Birthday Huey Lewis
moments.blurb: Huey Lewis, frontman of Huey Lewis and the News, known for 80s hits like 'The Power of Love,' turns 76 on July 5, 2026.

angles.name: 80s Legend
angles.copy: It's Hip to Be Square on July 5th, because it's Huey Lewis's 76th birthday! Still loving those classic 80s anthems. What's your favourite?

angles.name: The Power of Love
angles.copy: Happy 76th Birthday to the legendary Huey Lewis! We're celebrating with a blast of feel-good 80s rock. What's your favourite track from the News?

moments.title: Happy Birthday 50 Cent
moments.blurb: Grammy Award-winning rapper, actor, and entrepreneur 50 Cent (Curtis Jackson) celebrates his 51st birthday on July 6, 2026.

angles.name: In Da Club
angles.copy: Go shorty, it's your birthday! Happy 51st to the one and only 50 Cent on July 6th! What's your favourite track from the rap mogul?

angles.name: Hip-Hop Icon
angles.copy: Celebrating 50 Cent's 51st birthday today! From chart-topping hits to business ventures, he's a force. What's your favourite G-Unit era track?

moments.title: Happy Birthday Ringo Starr
moments.blurb: Legendary Beatles drummer Ringo Starr celebrates his 86th birthday on July 7, 2026.

angles.name: Peace & Love
angles.copy: Happy 86th Birthday to the iconic Ringo Starr on July 7th! Sending peace and love to the legendary Beatle. What's your favourite Ringo moment?

angles.name: Beatles Legend
angles.copy: Celebrating the one and only Ringo Starr's 86th birthday today! The heartbeat of The Beatles. What's your favourite song featuring his unique drumming?
